findings.message: plugin.json is missing the required version field, preventing marketplace publication and versioned plugin resolution
Vague quantifier 'significant' in update-mode step 1 leaves change detection threshold undefined for the orchestrating agent
Vague quantifier 'notable' in the example subagent prompt template leaves dependency scope undefined
Vague term 'non-obvious' appears in subagent prompt template and output template sections; subjective without definition
SKILL.md instructs the orchestrating agent to run pip install tiktoken without a version constraint, allowing arbitrary future versions including breaking or malicious releases
Script outputs curl-pipe-sh installation advice in its stderr error message but does not execute it; recommends an insecure install pattern to users
Inline UV script dependency 'tiktoken' carries no version pin; uv will resolve to the latest release on every cold run

plugin.json is missing the required version field, preventing marketplace publication and versioned plugin resolution — plugin.json contains name, description, author but no version field; Claude Code marketplace requires version for registration and versioned installs

Vague quantifier 'significant' in update-mode step 1 leaves change detection threshold undefined for the orchestrating agent — Line 31: 'If significant changes detected' — 'significant' is an unanchored vague quantifier with no numeric or structural threshold defined

Vague quantifier 'notable' in the example subagent prompt template leaves dependency scope undefined — Line 109: 'Notable dependencies' in subagent prompt template — 'notable' is a subjective, unanchored qualifier
Vague term 'non-obvious' appears in subagent prompt template and output template sections; subjective without definition

Script outputs curl-pipe-sh installation advice in its stderr error message but does not execute it; recommends an insecure install pattern to users — Line 26: curl-pipe-sh string appears inside print(..., file=sys.stderr); grep confirms no subprocess/os.system call anywhere in the file; the script never executes the command

SKILL.md instructs the orchestrating agent to run pip install tiktoken without a version constraint, allowing arbitrary future versions including breaking or malicious releases — Line 53: 'pip install tiktoken' with no version specifier; same pattern repeated at line 291

Inline UV script dependency 'tiktoken' carries no version pin; uv will resolve to the latest release on every cold run — Line 4: dependencies = ["tiktoken"] in PEP 723 inline script spec with no version constraint
